global.description: The ad features a combination of abstract shapes and text elements promoting a new season.
global.main_message: Promoting a new season with a call to action to start for free.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of circular and square shapes in a muted color palette, positioned centrally.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A larger square shape with a soft outline, overlapping with other shapes, centered in the ad.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A vertical rectangle shape with a soft outline, positioned centrally, featuring a light color.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A medium-sized square shape with a soft outline, overlapping with other elements, centered.

elements.label: small shape
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: small shape
elements.description: A tiny circular shape positioned slightly above the previous element.

elements.label: tiny shape
elements.description: An even smaller circular shape located towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: promotional message
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'A new season drops Start free today' positioned at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: new season drops Start free today

elements.label: brand logo
elements.description: The brand name 'BingeLayer' displayed in a prominent, bold font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Learn more' in a clear, inviting font located at the bottom of the ad.
